violations.text: Grease droplets observed on the metal panel and ansul pipes beneath the hood. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato chopper, slicer, knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Sweet potatoes, cheese sticks, and chicken observed held at 97-120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

Berries were not washed before being cut and put into fruit bowls. Plant foods must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Fruit was washed during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: blender base table beneath grill 6 burner stovetop knife rack ice machine . New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
A hose near kitchen handsink with spray nozzle is lacking a backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The ceiling above the ice machine has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
Kitchen ceiling panels and vents an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The walls in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris, especially behind the grill and beneath the wall-mounted knife rack. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
Grease droplets observed on the metal panels beneath the hood. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by numerous live small flies in establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. DeBug pest control service weekly, provided by Bryant University. Pest control service must be increased to 2X per week until issue is resolved. Bryant University Assistant Director of Auxiliary Services notified. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The dishwasher failed to wash his/her hands between loading soiled and unloading clean dishes from the dishwasher, only drying them and putting on gloves. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

The slicer was not in good repair, with hardware missing and broken plastic parts, impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. Slicer must be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Raw shelled eggs were stored over pre-cooked shelled eggs and raw beef was stored over raw pork. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. PIC moved items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed ice machine out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ventilation hoods in the kitchen and service area were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Fans in walk-in #1 were observed with minor accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The wall tiles in the kitchen near the slicer and the hot preparation areas are in poor repair. Multiple tiles were observed missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dishwashing area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
The tiles in the near kitchen prep unit and the stove area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023
